sources.title: Siemens introduces AI agents for industrial automation
sources.author: Siemens Press
sources.notes: Vendor press release. Claims (50% productivity target, 25% maintenance reduction) are self-reported.

sources.title: Agentic AI vs. Traditional AI: Key Differences
sources.author: FullStack Editorial
sources.notes: Secondary synthesis of definitions; useful for framing.

sources.title: 12 Agentic AI Examples With Measurable ROI: Enterprise Case Studies From 2025-2026
sources.author: AI Monk Editorial
sources.notes: Contains General Mills case study with $20M+ savings and 5,000+ daily shipments data.

sources.title: The agentic supply chain in manufacturing
sources.author: Deloitte Insights
sources.notes: Confirms Walmart agentic supply chain deployment. No quantified ROI; conceptual framing of technology stack.

sources.title: Gartner Forecasts Supply Chain Management Software with Agentic AI Will Grow to $53 Billion in Spend by 2030
sources.author: Gartner Newsroom
sources.notes: Primary analyst forecast. Gartner VP Analyst Balaji Abbabatulla quoted. Includes simple vs advanced agent breakdown.

sources.title: Cognite and ABB Collaborate to Integrate Agentic AI into Industrial Applications to Deliver Faster Workflows
sources.author: Cognite Press
sources.notes: Official partnership announcement. Aker BP confirmed as first customer. Agent-to-agent orchestration between ABB Ability SafetyInsight, AlarmInsight, and Cognite Data Fusion.

sources.title: Agentic AI in Energy and Utilities Market Size, Share & 2030 Growth Trends Report
sources.author: Mordor Intelligence Research
sources.notes: Market research firm report. $0.64B (2025), $0.87B (2026), $4.11B (2031) at 36.35% CAGR. Methodology not publicly disclosed.

sources.title: Agentic AI in Life Sciences: How Pharma and Biotech Are Moving from Pilots to Production in 2026
sources.notes: 67% of life sciences in pilots Q1 2026. Performance metrics (40-50% deviation investigation reduction, 60-75% batch record compression) cited from early industry deployments; specific companies withheld.

sources.title: AstraZeneca: AI-Powered Pharmaceutical Manufacturing (ARC Forum February 2026 presentation)
sources.publisher: Clarity Points (secondary account of ARC Forum)
sources.notes: Secondary coverage of AstraZeneca AIDA framework presentation by Magnus Nydén at ARC Forum, February 2026.

sources.title: Siemens and NVIDIA Expand Partnership to Build the Industrial AI Operating System
sources.author: NVIDIA Press
sources.notes: Official partnership announcement. Erlangen factory named as first blueprint. 2-10x EDA speedup target. Foxconn, HD Hyundai, KION Group, PepsiCo evaluating.

sources.title: NVIDIA and Partners Showcase the Future of AI-Driven Manufacturing at Hannover Messe 2026
sources.author: NVIDIA Editorial
sources.notes: Hannover Messe April 2026 demonstration of agentic design, real-time simulation, vision AI agents, and humanoid robots.

sources.title: Gartner Predicts Over 40% of Agentic AI Projects Will Be Canceled by End of 2027
sources.author: Gartner Newsroom
sources.notes: Key counter-signal to adoption optimism. Reasons: escalating costs, unclear business value, inadequate risk controls.

sources.title: Agentic AI in Industry: Adoption Level and Deployment Barriers
sources.author: Academic researchers (names not confirmed from abstract)
sources.notes: Academic study of 16 practitioners across 12 companies. Only 1 company at multi-agent orchestration level. Identifies 'capability-deployment verification gap' as primary barrier.

sources.title: prEN IEC 61508-1:2025 - Functional Safety General Requirements Standard
sources.notes: 2025 update extends requirements to human factors, security aspects, and clarifies AI scope.

sources.title: ISO/IEC CD TS 22440-1 - Artificial intelligence — Functional safety and AI systems — Part 1: Requirements
sources.notes: Currently Committee Draft stage. First international standard designed specifically for AI functional safety. Parts: Requirements, Guidance, Examples.

sources.title: The Complete Guide to Agentic AI in Industrial Operations: How AI Agents Are Transforming Manufacturing, Mining, and Asset-Intensive Industries in 2025
sources.author: XMPro Editorial
sources.notes: Vendor-authored comprehensive guide. Contains AIA CPT framework, technology stack details, and industry use cases. Mining metrics (30-40% productivity, 60-70% safety incident reduction) and O&G seismic metrics are vendor claims.

sources.title: 2026 Industrial AI Trends: Agentic Systems in Manufacturing
sources.author: IIoT World Editorial
sources.notes: Contains Suzano (95% SAP query time reduction), Danfoss (80% order processing automation), Elanco ($1.3M productivity loss avoided) case studies.

sources.title: Rockwell Automation Fair 2025 Shows How Autonomous Operations Can Truly Scale
sources.author: Verdantix Analysts
sources.notes: Independent analyst coverage of Rockwell Fair 2025. Confirms 6 initial Plex AI agents, 11 billion daily transactions on Elastic MES, Texas Instruments and GE deployments.

sources.title: Smart grid fault detection: how AI agents are shifting power distribution from reactive to proactive
sources.notes: Describes self-healing grid scenarios; 80% outage duration reduction figure cited from utility pilot reports.

sources.title: Agentic AIs in energy systems In 2026: what's new?
sources.notes: Confirms Tata Power-Salesforce Agentforce deployment for renewable energy, March 2026.

sources.title: Catalysing new value streams in oil and gas with agentic AI
sources.author: PwC Research
sources.notes: Contains BCG 2025 estimate of 30-70% incremental EBIT-equivalent from full AI agent integration in O&G. Consultant claim; independent verification not found.

sources.title: Operational AI Arrives: What the Palantir-NVIDIA Partnership Means for Supply Chain Leaders
sources.author: Logistics Viewpoints Editorial
sources.notes: Covers Palantir-NVIDIA partnership and Lowe's digital twin logistics deployment. October 2025 announcement.

sources.title: AI Agents in Logistics & Supply Chain: Use Cases & ROI 2026
sources.notes: $8.67B (2025) to $16.84B (2030) logistics/supply chain agentic AI market estimate.

sources.title: The state of AI in 2025: Agents, innovation, and transformation
sources.author: McKinsey Research
sources.notes: McKinsey State of AI 2025. 80% cite data limitations; ~5.5% get real ROI; <10% have scaled to value; supply chain logistics >20% cost reduction figure.

sources.title: Samsung Electronics Announces Strategy To Transition Global Manufacturing Into AI-Driven Factories by 2030
sources.notes: Official Samsung announcement. Digital twin simulations and specialized quality/logistics AI agents. 2030 target for AI-driven factory transition.

sources.title: Honeywell and Google Cloud to Accelerate Autonomous Operations with AI Agents for the Industrial Sector
sources.author: Honeywell Press
sources.notes: Announced October 2024; first solutions available to customers in 2025. Gemini on Vertex AI + Honeywell Forge IoT platform.

sources.title: AI-Powered Robotic Asset Inspections with ANYbotics
sources.notes: GE Vernova-ANYbotics formal collaboration for legged robotics industrial inspection; 2025 announcement.

sources.title: Impact 2025: Cognite Brings Global Industrial Leaders Together in Houston to Accelerate Agentic AI Adoption
sources.author: Cognite Newsroom
sources.notes: Conference newsroom with customer list (ExxonMobil, Koch, Aker BP, Idemitsu, NOVA Chemicals, Cosmo Energy, Nippon Shokubai, HMH). Capgemini 2025 stat (82% plan agent integration by 2027; 25-40% efficiency gains) also cited here.

sources.title: C3 AI Launches C3 Code
sources.author: C3.ai Press
sources.notes: General availability of C3 Code announced April 8, 2026. Part of broader C3 Agentic AI Platform.

sources.title: 2026: The year agentic AI transforms industrial manufacturing
sources.notes: Sponsored content from Infor. Key insight: primary barrier is psychological, not technological. Deloitte 6%→24% adoption projection also cited in related sources.

sources.title: Americas OT Cybersecurity Threat Landscape: ICS, SCADA & Critical Infrastructure Attack Trends
sources.notes: 11% of 1M OT devices with exploitable vulnerabilities; 87% YoY OT ransomware increase; sector breakdown (manufacturing 33%, energy 23%, O&G 22%).

sources.title: Agentic AI Market Size, Share & Forecast Report, 2034
sources.notes: Broad agentic AI market: $7.29B (2025), 40.50% CAGR, $139.19B by 2034. Scope includes all industries.

sources.title: Agentic AI Statistics 2026: 150+ Data Points Collection
sources.notes: Aggregates multiple sources including McKinsey $2.6-4.4T annual value estimate across all business use cases (non-industrial-specific).

sources.title: Gartner Predicts 40% of Enterprise Apps Will Feature Task-Specific AI Agents by 2026, Up from Less Than 5% in 2025
sources.author: Gartner Newsroom
sources.notes: Enterprise-wide prediction. 60%+ of organizations plan to deploy agents within 2 years; 40% enterprise apps with agents by end 2026.

sources.title: Manufacturing's 2026 Mandate: From AI Pilot to Agentic Profit
sources.notes: 6% current manufacturing adoption (2025); Deloitte projects fourfold increase to 24% in 2026. MIT finding that only 5% of GenAI projects reach scale across industries.

sources.title: ABB, Cognite partner to enhance industrial workflows with agentic AI
sources.author: Verdict Editorial
sources.notes: Independent media coverage of ABB-Cognite partnership. Clarifies agent-to-agent architecture and Aker BP as first customer.

sources.title: Agentic AI in Energy Market Growth and Forecast
sources.notes: Alternative market forecast: $656.60M (2025) growing to $14.9B by 2035 at 36.65% CAGR. Grid operations/self-healing segment: 24.60% share in 2025. Figures differ from Mordor due to scope variation.

sources.title: McKinsey: Agentic AI implementations in advanced industries
sources.author: McKinsey Research
sources.notes: $450B-$650B additional annual revenue potential by 2030 in advanced industries; Volvo Trucks AI maintenance system mentioned. Fetch timed out; summary from search results.

sources.title: How agentic AI can be a 'force multiplier' in IT and OT cybersecurity
sources.notes: Covers both agentic AI for OT defense and the risk of AI-accelerated attack lifecycles in ICS environments.
